description: A designed horizontal banner-style slogan graphic. The background is a dark navy-blue field with a glowing cyan/teal digital fingerprint rendered on the right side, composed of luminous dots and ridge lines evoking biometric scanning and a high-tech surveillance/forensics theme. On the left in large white serif type is the headline 'Help USCIS by Reporting Fraud', with the word 'Fraud' set in bold for emphasis. No additional body text or seal is visible on the image. The style is sleek and corporate-techy (digital-security visual language). The messaging is a call to action recruiting the public to act as informants and report suspected immigration fraud; the fingerprint imagery signals identity verification and law-enforcement capability. Tweet context provides the online tip-form link and the slogan 'Together we can keep America safe.'
